name: $20,000 Prize-Winning Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Wyler's beef-flavor instant bouillon (or 6 cubes)
1/2 tsp Louisiana hot sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, brown half the meat and remove it.
2. Brown the remaining meat and pour off all but 2 tablespoons of fat.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook until tender.
4. Return meat to pan. Add remaining ingredients except flour, cornmeal, and warm water.
5. Mix well. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 2 hours.
6. In a bowl, stir together flour and cornmeal with warm water until smooth.
7. Stir the mixture into the chili. Cook, covered, for an additional 20 minutes.
8. Serve hot. Makes 2 quarts.
